text.title: Embeddings Provider APIs — Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from input brief to signed-off output code.

list.item: Input: Use cases.
Action: Author `EmbeddingsClient.embed(texts, input_type, dims) -> list[list[float]]`.
Output: embeddings/client.py with abstract interface.
Decision gate: If interface needs to grow, version it explicitly.
Input: Provider SDKs.
Action: Implement adapters for OpenAI, Voyage, Cohere, sentence-transformers.
Output: providers/<name>.py + tests.
Decision gate: If a provider lacks a feature (input_type, dims), document and pass-through default.
Input: Provider rate limits.
Action: Implement batch size per provider + tenacity retry.
Output: Batching logic verified vs provider docs.
Decision gate: If a provider has streaming or async embedding, expose it through the same interface.
Input: Provider list.
Action: Implement provider order + fallback on error.
Output: Fallback chain tested with synthetic outage.
Decision gate: If fallback latency > 2x primary, log + alert.
Input: Eval set.
Action: Benchmark each provider on your eval; pick primary + fallback.
Output: Benchmark report + production rollout.
Decision gate: If primary changes, rerun the benchmark; don't switch on hearsay.
